_comment_purpose: AuthorityGate HealthCheck minimum-scope read-only role for Nutanix Prism Central / Element. Only the 11 view_* permissions the AuthorityGate audit actually queries. Nutanix exposes 390+ view_* permissions in total - we deliberately request the smallest subset that produces a complete report so the customer's least-privilege posture is preserved.
_comment_setup: Import via Prism Central -> Administration -> Roles -> Create Role and select these 11 permissions, OR POST this JSON to /api/nutanix/v3/roles. Bind the resulting role to the AuthorityGate scan service account at scope 'All clusters' (NOT a specific Project).
_comment_what_plugins_read: Each permission maps to one or more AuthorityGate plugins: view_cluster (Cluster Inventory + Data Resilience), view_host (Host Inventory + 30-day CPU/Mem peak), view_vm (VM State Summary), view_storage_container (Storage Container 30-day Peak), view_subnet (AHV Subnet Inventory), view_vm_snapshot (Snapshot Sprawl), view_alert (Active Alerts), view_audit (Audit Events), view_task (Failed Tasks), view_protection_rule + view_recovery_plan (Data Resilience plugin).

spec.name: AuthorityGate-HealthCheck-ReadOnly
spec.description: Minimum-scope read-only role for the AuthorityGate Horizon HealthCheck audit. Read inventory + alerts + audit + tasks + 30-day perf rollups. NO mutating permissions.
